name: Swedish Christmas Crescents
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and powdered sugar.
2. Beat in the vanilla, salt, and ground almonds until well combined.
3. Gradually blend in the flour.
4. Shape the dough into crescents using a rounded teaspoon for each.
5. Sprinkle each crescent with the cinnamon-sugar mixture.
6. Bake on ungreased cookie sheets at 325°F for 15-18 minutes.
